versions.version_description: More accurate, more complete than other versions.
This version has accurate chording and has a link to a video for reference.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Supertramp
Song: Take the Long Way Home

[Intro]
[ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
  So you think you're a Romeo    Playing a part in a picture-show[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Well, take the long way home    Take the long way home[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                             [ch]Bb[/ch]
  'Cause you're the joke of the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
  Why should you care if you're feeling good[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Well, take the long way home    Take the long way home[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]Em11[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G6[/ch]
  But there are times that you feel you're part of the scenery[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
All the greenery      is comin' do--wn, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G6[/ch]
  And then your wife seems to think you're part of the furniture[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, it's peculiar,      she used to be--- so--- nice[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
  When lonely days turn to lonely nights[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
  You take a trip to the city lights[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And take the long way home    Take the long way home[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
  You never see what you want to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
  Forever playing to the gallery[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
You take the long way home    Take the long way home[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Em11[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G6[/ch]
  And when you're up on the stage, it's so unbelievable[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, unforgettable,     how they ado---re you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G6[/ch]
  But then your wife seems to think you're losing your sanity[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, calamity,     oh is there no--- way-- out[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  x2

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Em11[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G6[/ch]
  Does it feel that your life's become a catastrophy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, it has to be,    for you to gro---w, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G6[/ch]
  When you look through the years and see what you could have been[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, what you might have been,    if you had ha--d mo--re time[/tab]

[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
  So, when the day comes to settle down[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
  Who's to blame if you're not around[/tab]
[tab]You took the long way home (8x: [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] )
[ch]Csus4[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Csus4[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Csus4[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Ah-ah-ah-ah, ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh, ah-ah-ah-ah[/tab]

[Outro]
Long way home (7x: [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] )
